name: Aunt Arlene's Iced Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tea bags in a pan. Add enough water to cover the bags, bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and drain the tea bags.
3. Add sugar to the cooled tea.
4. Stir into 1 gallon of water and add the concentrated lemonade.
5. Chill before serving.
If you prefer your tea stronger, allow the tea bags to steep in the refrigerator for some time.
